title: cremastra variabilis
intro: Cremastra variabilis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses or variable orchid, is a type of orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cremastra variabilis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although modern research is still being conducted to confirm its efficacy and safety.
